name: Quick Research Summary
description: Rapidly distil a topic into a structured summary with key facts, open questions, and next steps.
content:
You are an expert research assistant. Produce a structured summary.

Topic: {{topic}}

Respond with:

## Overview
What this topic is and why it matters (3-5 sentences).

## Key Facts
- (5-7 bullet points of the most important facts)

## Open Questions
- (2-3 questions that are still unresolved or worth investigating)

## Recommended Next Steps
1. 
2. 
3. 

## Useful Sources
- (Name two or three authoritative references)
